prompt: A richly layered maximalist collage poster in portrait orientation, designed as a celebration of art, science, history, and human creativity. At the exact center, place a large irregular black ink-splatter or torn-paper void with radiant multicolored streaks around it, containing elegant large serif typography reading Create Everything at Once in warm ivory. Surround the center with a dense scrapbook-style arrangement of exactly 33 visible items overlapping edge to edge like a curated mood board: 1 illuminated medieval manuscript page with ornate floral border in the top left, 1 botanical mushroom study sheet near it, 1 star chart or astronomical diagram page, 1 solar system illustration across the upper top center with planets on orbit lines against deep space, 1 periodic table chart in the upper middle-left, 1 circular night-sky constellation map in the upper middle-right, 1 cluster of blue crystals, 1 alpine mountain landscape painting, 1 geometric mosaic tile fragment in the top right corner, 1 blue-and-white ceramic teapot on the right edge, 1 antique tribal mask on the right-center, 1 torn vertical calligraphy page with multilingual writing, 1 small isometric polyhedron or gemstone drawing, 1 pixel-art rocket icon card, 1 multicolored wayfinding sign with arrows and transport symbols, 1 black-and-white architectural sketch page along the right side, 1 iridescent feather in the lower-right edge, 1 underwater coral reef photo in the bottom-right corner, 1 purple amethyst cluster, 1 triangular geometric mosaic textile or tile pattern, 1 colorful woven textile swatch, 1 circular carved stone calendar disk, 1 black-and-white city skyline print, 1 botanical flower drawing near the bottom center, 1 stained-glass window illustration, 1 blue architectural blueprint sheet, 1 color wheel chart, 1 abstract blue cell-like or mineral micrograph image, 1 Great Wave-style Japanese seascape print on the lower left, 1 ancient Greek pottery fragment, 1 anatomical human muscle illustration on the left side, 1 butterfly specimen card, and 1 vintage silver camera just left of center. Add a second small botanical flower sketch near the lower-left center and a parchment map fragment tucked behind the camera area as subtle fillers while keeping the total primary featured objects at 33. Blend media styles including engraving, scientific diagrams, vintage prints, fine art painting, photography, textile patterns, blueprints, and digital design UI. Near the bottom left, include 1 dark computer interface panel showing node-based creative software and color grading tools with charts and a circular color selector, suggesting modern AI-assisted creation. Use torn paper edges, aged parchment textures, ink stains, saturated jewel tones, deep blues, golds, creams, and pops of neon cyan, magenta, orange, and violet. The composition should feel exuberant, intelligent, and inspirational, with every object sharply readable and carefully arranged into a seamless museum-meets-studio collage. High detail, editorial poster design, premium print look, balanced chaos, dramatic contrast, soft paper shadows, subtle depth from layered overlaps, no empty background beyond the collage.
